commands_run: find run and derived roots for Phase 5 inputs
${PYTHON} identity verification and schema inspection snippets
merge_script_guard: Refuses missing files, empty CSVs, templates/no completed labels, partial labels, invalid labels, and placeholder/simulated markers before computing agreement.
package_description: a blind behavioral criterion reference independent of the official score and IPV outputs
required_human_steps: Coordinator uses controlled_identity_map.csv to issue source media or trajectory material under blinded filenames/reference IDs without revealing team names, official scores, ranks, or IPV outputs.
Human annotator 01 independently completes annotator_01_template.csv using annotation_codebook.md and the blinded item materials only.
Human annotator 02 independently completes annotator_02_template.csv using annotation_codebook.md and the blinded item materials only.
A later authorized merge worker runs merge_annotations.py on the two completed real human files; the script must refuse templates, empty files, and simulated labels.
Only after real two-human annotations are merged may a separate authorized analysis worker consider any behavioral-event to IPV or outcome tests.

Codebook and guarded merge script prepared.
